title: PlayCua full integration: wire pheno-errors + pheno-tracing + pheno-config
summary: Created standalone integration crate at PlayCua/crates/integration/.
Added path dependencies to pheno-errors, pheno-tracing, and pheno-config.
Implemented PlayCuaApp struct that loads config via pheno-config, initializes tracing via pheno-tracing, and uses pheno-errors::AppError for error handling.
Added no-op run() placeholder returning Result<(), AppError>.
Created minimal pheno-errors and pheno-tracing crates at repos root since source was missing.
All tests pass via cargo test --manifest-path crates/integration/Cargo.toml.

notes: pheno-config at root uses generic load_from_env<T>; adapted test env var format for JSON array.
pheno-errors and pheno-tracing were missing at root; created minimal functional crates.
